title: Excalibur | Tetra Compat
description: Changes Tetra textures to Excalibur style
body:
Changes the Tetra's textures in the manner of Excalibur.

The textures of the following tools from the Tetra mod have been reworked:

1. All parts of swords, including handles, modules and blades with their upgrades
2. All two-handed tools, including handles, sockets, and upgrade modules
3. All bows, their variations and upgrades for them
4. Crafting table
5. Rack

![My netherite set](https://i.imgur.com/QTomxE3.png)

In process:
1. Hammers and their upgrades
2. Crossbows
3. Shields

![Armed to the teeth](https://i.imgur.com/F7vhVlu.png)

[Original author of Excalibur Maffhew!](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew)

Enjoy
